privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic GUI automation task for Jitsi Meet version stable-9753 (Docker-based, released September 2024). It requires joining a test meeting room named 'NoisyCafe' and enabling push-to-talk functionality, then capturing three evidence screenshots. Jitsi Meet provides push-to-talk as a built-in feature accessible via the SPACE key. Push-to-Talk is always available in Jitsi Meet without requiring explicit enablement through settings, though the task describes enabling it in a settings dialog. The evidence files are stored at /home/ga/ptt_settings.png, /home/ga/ptt_inactive.png, and /home/ga/ptt_active.png. Jitsi Meet is accessible at http://localhost:8080.
